description: Istio service-mesh monitoring dashboard powered by the standard Istio Prometheus telemetry (`istio_requests_total`, `istio_request_duration_milliseconds`, `istio_request_bytes`, `istio_response_bytes`, `istio_tcp_*_total`). Provides general overview, traffic management, performance averages, error metrics, and TCP data-plane visibility. All counter and histogram queries pin `reporter=destination` to avoid double-counting (Istio emits identical telemetry from both source and destination proxies). Filter by destination namespace / destination workload / source workload via the variables at the top.
title: Istio Service Mesh - Prometheus

703f9e9b-4083-4a5e-ad50-32a2afbe0432.name: destination_workload_namespace
703f9e9b-4083-4a5e-ad50-32a2afbe0432.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'

11890556-b5bb-4d37-9616-7eee90d3f453.description: Filter by destination workload (cascades from namespace)
11890556-b5bb-4d37-9616-7eee90d3f453.name: destination_workload
11890556-b5bb-4d37-9616-7eee90d3f453.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'
  AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace') IN $destination_workload_namespace

5821878d-9390-4e0c-96a1-20235a8fe69c.name: source_workload
5821878d-9390-4e0c-96a1-20235a8fe69c.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'source_workload'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'istio_requests_total'

widgets.description: Total request rate across the mesh (requests/sec). Source: rate(istio_requests_total). Filtered to reporter=destination to avoid double-counting.
widgets.title: Total Request Rate

widgets.description: Count of distinct destination workloads emitting telemetry in the selected window. Uses aggregateOperator='count' grouped by destination_workload — repo precedent: gcp/compute-engine 'Total Active GCE Instances'.
widgets.title: Active Destination Workloads

widgets.description: Average request duration computed as rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_sum) / rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_count). Repo precedent: apm/apm-metrics.json 'Database Calls Avg Duration'.
widgets.title: Average Request Latency

widgets.description: Percentage of 5xx responses out of total. Computed as (A/B)*100 where A = rate of 5xx responses and B = total request rate.
widgets.title: Error Rate (5xx %)

widgets.description: Rate of istio_requests_total grouped by destination_workload. Identifies which services receive the most traffic.
widgets.title: Request Rate by Destination Workload

widgets.description: Stacked rate of istio_requests_total by HTTP response_code. Shows the 2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx mix over time.
widgets.title: Request Rate by Response Code

widgets.description: Stacked rate by request_protocol (http, grpc, tcp).
widgets.title: Request Protocol Distribution

widgets.description: Rate split by connection_security_policy (mutual_tls vs none). Useful to verify that mTLS is in effect for in-mesh traffic.
widgets.title: Connection Security Policy (mTLS coverage)

widgets.description: Mesh-wide average request duration over time. Computed as rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_sum) / rate(istio_request_duration_milliseconds_count).
widgets.title: Average Request Latency Over Time

widgets.description: Per-service average latency = rate(<metric>_sum) / rate(<metric>_count) grouped by destination_workload. Surfaces slow services.
widgets.title: Average Latency by Destination Workload

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by destination_workload (proxy for per-service throughput).
widgets.title: Throughput by Destination Workload

widgets.description: Average request body size = rate(istio_request_bytes_sum)/rate(istio_request_bytes_count). Same shape for response. Per-formula computed series.
widgets.title: Average Request / Response Body Sizes

widgets.description: Rate of error responses (response_code in 4xx/5xx code list), stacked by code. Uses explicit code lists rather than range comparison since response_code is a string label in Prometheus.
widgets.title: HTTP Error Rates (4xx / 5xx)

widgets.description: Rate of 5xx responses by destination workload — identifies failing services.
widgets.title: Failed Requests by Destination Workload (5xx)

widgets.description: Rate of requests by Envoy response_flags (excluding `-`). Surfaces proxy-level conditions: UH=upstream host, UF=upstream connection failure, NR=no route, UR=upstream retry.
widgets.title: Envoy Response Flags

widgets.description: Rate of TCP connections opened and closed across the mesh, reporter=destination.
widgets.title: TCP Connection Rate (Opened / Closed)

widgets.description: Rate of TCP bytes sent and received across data-plane sidecars.
widgets.title: TCP Throughput (Sent / Received)
